title: 🌀 Regret Spirals (Recursive Sorrow)
name: Regret Spirals (Recursive Sorrow)
what_it_is: Emotional attractors built from spirals of decision echo—recursive loops of imagined better outcomes haunting the present.
how_to_use: his mind spins regret spirals—each loop a replay of what could’ve been
she dreams in recursive sorrow—every alternate path lived and lost inside
animation_behavior: Scene plays out in loops with variation, faces shift across alternate paths, light dims then blooms and fails ---
